name: Inner Darkness
short_description: Inner Darkness is a first-person horror game made in pixelated 3D graphics that immerses you in an atmosphere of loneliness. The gameplay consists in walking around locations, solving riddles.
detailed_description:
Inner Darkness is a first-person horror game made in pixelated 3D graphics that immerses you in an atmosphere of loneliness. The gameplay consists in walking around locations, solving riddles.

In it you have to get into a mysterious city and solve various riddles, the solution of which will be hindered by various inexplicable phenomena by science. Also, to complete the game, you will have to collect the necessary items that may come in handy in the passage or even be necessary.

Brief background:

You don’t remember anything, not how you got into a strange empty city, not even the language in which everything is written. Recognize yourself and find familiar images in an unfamiliar city.


[This game was made by small studio, so there is may be some bugs]
